1.exp: الواسع الرحمة الذي وسعت رحمته كل شيء في الدنيا.
1.expEn: The Most Compassionate, whose mercy encompasses all of creation in this life.

2.expEn: The Most Merciful, especially to the believers in the Hereafter.

3.exp: المالك المطلق لكل شيء، المتصرّف في مُلكه بلا منازع.
3.expEn: The Sovereign King who owns and rules all things absolutely.

4.exp: المنزّه عن كل نقصٍ وعيب، الطاهر المعظَّم.
4.expEn: The Most Holy, utterly free of any flaw or imperfection.

5.exp: السالم من كل عيب، ومنه السلام والأمان لخلقه.
5.expEn: The Source of peace and safety, free of all defect.

6.exp: المصدّق لرسله، المُؤمِّن لعباده من الظلم.
6.expEn: The Giver of security, who affirms His messengers and grants safety.

7.exp: الرقيب الحافظ المسيطر على كل شيء.
7.expEn: The Guardian who watches over and oversees all things.

8.expEn: The Almighty, ever-prevailing and never overcome.

9.exp: العظيم الذي ينفذ أمره ويجبر الكسير ويُصلح أحوال خلقه.
9.expEn: The Compeller, whose will prevails and who mends the broken.

10.exp: المتعالي عن صفات الخلق، له الكبرياء والعظمة.
10.expEn: The Supremely Great, exalted far above all creation.

11.exp: المُقدِّر للأشياء والموجِد لها من العدم.
11.expEn: The Creator who brings all things into existence from nothing.

12.exp: الذي برأ الخلق وأوجده على غير مثالٍ سابق.
12.expEn: The Maker who fashions creation flawlessly without prior model.

13.exp: الذي صوّر كل مخلوقٍ بالصورة التي أرادها.
13.expEn: The Shaper who gives every creature its distinct form.

14.exp: كثير المغفرة، يستر الذنوب ويغفرها مرّةً بعد مرّة.
14.expEn: The Ever-Forgiving, who conceals and pardons sins again and again.

15.exp: الغالب لكل شيء، الذي قهر خلقه بقدرته.
15.expEn: The Subduer who dominates all things by His power.

16.exp: كثير العطاء بلا عوضٍ ولا غرض.
16.expEn: The Bestower who gives generously without expecting return.

17.exp: الذي يرزق جميع خلقه ويكفل أقواتهم.
17.expEn: The Provider who sustains all creatures with their provision.

18.exp: الذي يفتح أبواب الرحمة والرزق، ويحكم بين عباده بالحق.
18.expEn: The Opener of mercy and provision, who judges with truth.

19.exp: المحيط علمه بكل شيء، ظاهرِه وخفيِّه.
19.expEn: The All-Knowing, whose knowledge encompasses everything seen and hidden.

20.expEn: The Withholder who constricts provision and souls by His wisdom.

21.exp: الذي يبسط الرزق ويوسّعه لمن يشاء.
21.expEn: The Expander who extends provision generously to whom He wills.

22.expEn: The Abaser who lowers the arrogant and the wrongdoers.

23.expEn: The Exalter who raises the believers and the obedient.

24.exp: الذي يهب العزّة والكرامة لمن يشاء.
24.expEn: The Giver of honour, who grants might to whom He wills.

25.exp: الذي يُذلّ من يشاء بعدله وحكمته.
25.expEn: The Humbler, who brings low whom He wills with justice.

26.exp: الذي يسمع كل شيء، لا يخفى عليه صوت.
26.expEn: The All-Hearing, from whom no sound is hidden.

27.exp: الذي يبصر كل شيء وإن دقّ وخفي.
27.expEn: The All-Seeing, who perceives all, however small or hidden.

28.exp: الحاكم العدل الذي يفصل بين الخلق.
28.expEn: The Judge who decides between His creation with justice.

29.exp: الذي لا يجور في حكمه، كامل العدل.
29.expEn: The Utterly Just, who never wrongs in His judgment.

30.exp: البَرّ بعباده الذي يعلم دقائق الأمور ويوصل لطفه برفق.
30.expEn: The Subtle and Kind, gentle with His servants and aware of the finest matters.

31.expEn: The All-Aware of the inner reality of all things.

32.exp: الذي لا يعجل بالعقوبة على العاصين.
32.expEn: The Forbearing, who does not hasten to punish.

33.exp: الذي له العظمة المطلقة في ذاته وصفاته.
33.expEn: The Magnificent, possessing absolute greatness in essence and attributes.

34.expEn: The Great Forgiver who wipes away sins.

35.exp: الذي يجزي على القليل من الطاعة بالكثير من الثواب.
35.expEn: The Appreciative, who rewards little obedience with abundant reward.

36.exp: العالي على كل شيء بذاته وقدره وقهره.
36.expEn: The Most High, exalted above all in essence, rank and power.

37.exp: الذي كل شيءٍ دونه صغير، له الكبرياء.
37.expEn: The Most Great, beside whom all else is small.

38.expEn: The Preserver who guards His creation and records all deeds.

39.exp: الذي يوصل القوت إلى الأبدان والأرواح.
39.expEn: The Nourisher who delivers sustenance to bodies and souls.

40.exp: الكافي عبادَه، المحاسب لهم على أعمالهم.
40.expEn: The Reckoner who suffices His servants and brings them to account.

41.expEn: The Majestic, described by all attributes of grandeur.

42.exp: الكثير الخير، الجواد المعطي بلا حساب.
42.expEn: The Generous, abundant in goodness, giving without measure.

43.exp: المراقب لخلقه الذي لا يغفل عن شيء.
43.expEn: The Watchful, ever-observant, who overlooks nothing.

44.exp: الذي يجيب دعاء الداعين ويلبّي حاجاتهم.
44.expEn: The Responsive, who answers the prayers of those who call.

45.expEn: The All-Encompassing in mercy, knowledge and bounty.

46.exp: الذي يضع الأشياء في مواضعها بحكمةٍ بالغة.
46.expEn: The Perfectly Wise, who places all things in their right order.

47.expEn: The Most Loving, who loves His righteous servants and is beloved to them.

48.expEn: The Most Glorious, vast in honour and majesty.

49.exp: الذي يبعث الخلق بعد الموت ويبعث الرسل.
49.expEn: The Resurrector who raises the dead and sends the messengers.

50.exp: المطّلع على كل شيء، الحاضر الذي لا يغيب.
50.expEn: The Witness, present over all and aware of everything.

51.exp: الثابت الذي لا يزول، وجودُه حقّ وعبادتُه حقّ.
51.expEn: The Truth, ever-existing, whose being and worship are the truth.

52.expEn: The Trustee who takes charge of His creation’s affairs.

53.exp: التامّ القدرة الذي لا يلحقه عجز.
53.expEn: The Possessor of all strength, whom no weakness touches.

54.exp: الشديد القوّة الذي لا تنقطع قدرته.
54.expEn: The Firm in strength, whose power never wanes.

55.expEn: The Protecting Friend who supports and cares for His allies.

56.exp: المحمود في ذاته وأفعاله، المستحقّ لكل حمد.
56.expEn: The Praiseworthy, deserving of all praise in essence and deeds.

57.exp: الذي أحصى كل شيءٍ عددًا، لا يفوته شيء.
57.expEn: The Reckoner who has counted all things in number.

58.expEn: The Originator who began creation from nothing.

59.expEn: The Restorer who brings creation back after its end.

60.expEn: The Giver of Life, who grants life and revives the dead.

61.exp: الذي يقدّر الموت على من شاء.
61.expEn: The Bringer of Death, who decrees death by His will.

62.exp: الحيّ حياةً كاملةً لا يعتريها موتٌ ولا نقص.
62.expEn: The Ever-Living, with perfect life untouched by death.

63.exp: القائم بنفسه، المقيم لكل شيءٍ سواه.
63.expEn: The Self-Subsisting, by whom all else is sustained.

64.exp: الغنيّ الذي لا يعوزه شيء، يجد ما يريد.
64.expEn: The Finder, in need of nothing, who attains whatever He wills.

65.expEn: The Noble and Glorious, vast in majesty and generosity.

66.expEn: The One and Only, unique with no partner.

67.exp: الفرد الذي لا نظير له ولا مثيل.
67.expEn: The Indivisible One, without peer or likeness.

68.exp: السيّد الذي تَصمُد إليه الخلائق في حوائجها.
68.expEn: The Eternal Refuge, to whom all turn in their needs.

69.exp: الذي يقدر على كل شيءٍ بلا عجز.
69.expEn: The All-Capable, able to do all things.

70.exp: التامّ القدرة الذي لا يُعجزه شيء.
70.expEn: The Omnipotent, of complete and overwhelming power.

71.exp: الذي يقدّم ما يشاء من الأمور والخلق.
71.expEn: The Expediter who advances whatever He wills.

72.exp: الذي يؤخّر ما يشاء بحكمته وعدله.
72.expEn: The Delayer who defers whatever He wills by His wisdom.

73.expEn: The First, with nothing before Him.

74.exp: الذي ليس بعده شيء، الباقي بعد فناء خلقه.
74.expEn: The Last, with nothing after Him, remaining after all else passes.

75.exp: العالي فوق كل شيء، الظاهر بآياته.
75.expEn: The Manifest, above all and evident through His signs.

76.exp: العالم ببواطن الأمور، المحتجب عن الأبصار.
76.expEn: The Hidden, aware of all inner things, beyond perception.

77.expEn: The Governor who manages and oversees creation’s affairs.

78.expEn: The Most Exalted, far above any deficiency.

79.expEn: The Source of all goodness, abundant in kindness to creation.

80.exp: الذي يقبل توبة عباده ويوفّقهم إليها.
80.expEn: The Acceptor of Repentance, who guides to it and accepts it.

81.expEn: The Avenger who justly requites the persistent wrongdoers.

82.exp: الذي يمحو الذنوب ويعفو عن السيئات.
82.expEn: The Pardoner who effaces sins and overlooks faults.

83.expEn: The Most Kind, deeply compassionate toward His servants.

84.exp: المالك للمُلك كلّه، يؤتيه من يشاء.
84.expEn: Owner of all Sovereignty, who grants dominion to whom He wills.

85.expEn: Lord of Majesty and Honour, of grandeur and bounty.

86.expEn: The Equitable, just in judgment and fair to the oppressed.

87.expEn: The Gatherer who will assemble all creation on the Day of Judgment.

88.exp: الغنيّ بذاته عن كل ما سواه.
88.expEn: The Self-Sufficient, in need of nothing besides Himself.

89.expEn: The Enricher who grants sufficiency to His servants.

90.exp: الذي يمنع ما يشاء عمّن يشاء بحكمته.
90.expEn: The Withholder who, by His wisdom, withholds what He wills.

91.exp: الذي لا يقع ضرٌّ إلا بمشيئته وتقديره.
91.expEn: The One by whose decree alone any harm can occur.

92.exp: الذي لا يصل نفعٌ إلا بإذنه وتقديره.
92.expEn: The Source of all benefit, which comes only by His leave.

93.exp: نور السماوات والأرض، الهادي بنوره من يشاء.
93.expEn: The Light of the heavens and the earth, who guides by His light.

94.exp: الذي يهدي عباده إلى الحقّ والصلاح.
94.expEn: The Guide who leads His servants to truth and right.

95.exp: المُبدِع للخلق على غير مثالٍ سبق.
95.expEn: The Incomparable Originator who creates without prior model.

96.exp: الدائم الذي لا يفنى ولا يزول.
96.expEn: The Everlasting, who never perishes or fades.

97.exp: الباقي بعد فناء خلقه، إليه ترجع الأمور.
97.expEn: The Inheritor who remains after all creation, to whom all returns.

98.exp: الذي تأتي أفعاله وتدبيره على سداد ورُشد.
98.expEn: The Guide to the right course, whose decree is all wisdom.

99.exp: الذي لا يعجل بالعقوبة، يمهل ولا يهمل.
99.expEn: The Patient, who does not hasten punishment but gives respite.
